case_title: PETER N DUMAS VS. THISTLE LLC,A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DUMAS, PETER N AS TO DEFENDANT THISTLE LLC,A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA DINE RESTAURANT MCLASKEY, JULIA INDIVIDUALLY HILL, ROBERT INDIVIDUALLY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUMAS, PETER N RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT THISTLE LLC,A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA DINE RESTAURANT MCLASKEY, JULIA INDIVIDUALLY HILL, ROBERT INDIVIDUALLY $7,812.78 PRINCIPAL, $48.17 INTEREST, $153.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,014.25, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
